steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Divide both sides by 0.05 (equivalently, multiply by 20): $$w = 741.41 × 20 = 14{,}828.2$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches 14,828.2, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
